products.description: How-to guides and explanations on all of Auth0's offerings.

menu.description: Use Auth0's user store or your external database as an IdP.
Use social IdPs like Google or Facebook.
Use external, federated IdPs like Azure AD, Okta, or Google Workspace.
Send one-time passwords by email or SMS.
